> Generated for `@gravity-ui/blog-constructor@8.5.0`

# Blog Constructor

> A library based on the Page constructor library for creating blog-like services.
>
> **npm:** `@gravity-ui/blog-constructor` — check the installed major version in the user's `package.json` and read docs matching it.

## Install

```shell
npm install @gravity-ui/blog-constructor
```


> Note: this package's README does not yet have a `## For AI agents` section. See the [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gravity-ui/blog-constructor/main/README.md) for full documentation.

## Peer dependencies

Install these in the host project at a compatible version:

| Package | Version range |
| --- | --- |
| `react` | `^16.0.0 || ^17.0.0 || ^18.0.0 || ^19.0.0` |
| `@gravity-ui/uikit` | `^7.1.1` |
| `@diplodoc/transform` | `^4.10.7` |
| `@gravity-ui/page-constructor` | `^7.0.0` |
